title: geranium × splendens
intro: Geranium × splendens, also known as the Zonal Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geranium genus, characterized by its distinctive zoned leaves and vibrant flower colors. The medicinal properties of Geranium × splendens include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic agent, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. Herbal preparations of Geranium × splendens can be made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
